description: Installs Go via Chocolatey, configures GOPATH, PATH, go env settings, and Go tools (golangci-lint, go vet).

messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.scriptDisabled: Go installation is disabled in config.
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.goNotInstalled: Go is not installed -- installing via Chocolatey...
messages.goNotInPath: Go installed but go.exe not found in PATH -- may need a new terminal
messages.goVerifyStart: Verifying 'go version' works in current session...
messages.goVerifyMissing: 'go.exe' not on PATH after install -- refreshing environment from registry...
messages.goVerifyRefreshed: Environment refreshed from registry. PATH entries added: {count}
messages.goVerifyFoundAt: Found go.exe at: {path} -- prepending its folder to session PATH
messages.goVerifyFinalFail: Could not make 'go version' work in this session. Open a NEW terminal and re-run, or run: refreshenv
messages.goRootFallbackStart: 'go version' still failing -- attempting GOROOT/GOPATH fallback from discovered go.exe
messages.goRootInvalid: Discovered go.exe at {goexe} but GOROOT layout looks invalid (missing bin\go.exe under {goroot})
messages.goRootFallbackOk: Fallback succeeded: 'go version' now works after setting GOROOT/GOPATH
messages.goRootFallbackFailed: Fallback failed: setting GOROOT/GOPATH did not make 'go version' run
messages.chocoLibProbeStart: Probing Chocolatey lib path for package '{pkg}'...
messages.chocoLibMissing: Chocolatey lib path NOT found for '{pkg}' (looked under: {root})
messages.chocoLibProbeError: Could not read Chocolatey lib path for '{pkg}': {error}
messages.chocoLibToolsParentState: tools/go parent chain: chocoRoot={chocoRoot} (exists={chocoRootExists}); lib={libRoot} (exists={libRootExists}); pkg={libPath} (exists={libPathExists}); tools={toolsRoot} (exists={toolsRootExists})
messages.chocoLibToolsGoMissing: tools/go folder is MISSING at expected path: {toolspath}
messages.chocoListExitCode: 'choco list' exited with code {code}; lines captured: {lines}
messages.chocoListNoMatch: 'choco list' returned no '{pkg}|<version>' line. Sanitized output (first {head} / last {tail} lines): {snippet}
messages.chocoListEmpty: 'choco list' returned no output for '{pkg}' (exit code {code}).
messages.chocoListExeMissing: 'choco list' fallback skipped -- choco.exe not found at: {exe}
messages.chocoLibRepairDisabled: Chocolatey golang lib repair step is disabled in config (chocoLibRepair.enabled=false). Skipping.
messages.chocoLibRepairSkipNoLib: Chocolatey lib folder for '{pkg}' is absent ({libpath}); nothing to repair. Skipping.
messages.chocoLibRepairSkipHealthy: Chocolatey lib layout for '{pkg}' is healthy (tools/go present at {toolspath}); nothing to repair.
messages.chocoLibRepairSkipGoOnPath: Repair skipped: 'go.exe' is on PATH and chocoLibRepair.runWhenGoOnPath=false. The missing tools/go folder is cosmetic for newer choco golang packages.
messages.chocoLibRepairSkipGoMissing: Repair skipped: 'go.exe' is NOT on PATH but chocoLibRepair.runWhenGoMissing=false.
messages.chocoLibRepairStart: Starting Chocolatey lib repair for '{pkg}' -- mode={mode}, libPath={libpath}, toolsGoExists={toolsgoexists}.
messages.chocoLibRepairReportOnly: Repair mode is 'report-only'. Diagnosis: tools={toolsexists}, tools/go={toolsgoexists}. No changes made. Set chocoLibRepair.mode='clean' or 'reinstall' to take action.
messages.chocoLibRepairCleanStart: Repair mode 'clean': removing partial Chocolatey lib folder at {libpath}...
messages.chocoLibRepairCleanFail: Failed to remove Chocolatey lib folder {libpath}: {error}
messages.chocoLibRepairReinstallStart: Repair mode 'reinstall': uninstalling and reinstalling Chocolatey package '{pkg}'...
messages.chocoLibRepairUninstallFail: Uninstall step of repair failed for '{pkg}'. Continuing to reinstall attempt anyway.
messages.chocoLibRepairUnknownMode: Unknown chocoLibRepair.mode '{mode}'. Expected one of: report-only, clean, reinstall. Skipping repair.
messages.pathUpdateDisabled: User PATH update is disabled in config
messages.goEnvNoConfig: No goEnv settings in config -- skipping
messages.goEnvEmptyRelPath: go env {key} has empty relativePath -- skipping
messages.goEnvNoValue: No value resolved for go env {key} -- skipping
messages.goVetChecking: Checking go vet availability in a temporary module...
messages.goVetTempModule: Running go vet pre-check in temporary module: {path}
messages.goVetAvailable: go vet is available (built-in to Go toolchain)
messages.golangciLintNotInPath: golangci-lint installed but not found in PATH -- ensure GOPATH\bin is in PATH
messages.golangciLintDisabled: golangci-lint install is disabled in config
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.install: Install/upgrade Go only (skip env config and tools)
commands.configure: Configure GOPATH/env and install tools (skip Go install)
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
